tools.name: sage-payment-security-scanner
tools.description: SAGE Framework payment gateway security scanner (payment_security_scanner.py)

component.name: SAGE Framework — Payment Gateway Module
component.description: Payment gateway API endpoints for SAGE — charge, refund, status, webhooks

properties.name: pan_storage
properties.value: TOKENIZED_ONLY — raw PAN must not be stored (Required)

properties.name: encryption_at_rest
properties.value: NOT_MET — AES-256 field encryption required (see ENC-001)

properties.name: encryption_in_transit
properties.value: PARTIAL — TLS at reverse proxy; HTTPSRedirect not in code

properties.name: audit_logging
properties.value: PARTIAL — AuditLogger present; payment events not wired

properties.name: pii_filter
properties.value: DISABLED — pii.enabled: false; PAN may reach LLM (Critical)

properties.name: cors_status
properties.value: WILDCARD — CORS-001 Critical finding; must be fixed

vulnerabilities.description: Wildcard CORS enables cross-origin payment request forgery
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Restrict CORS to explicit payment origin allowlist via SAGE_PAYMENT_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

vulnerabilities.description: Cardholder data storage lacks AES-256 field-level encryption
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Implement Fernet/AES-256 field encryption; enable encryption.at_rest: true

vulnerabilities.description: No PAN tokenization layer — raw PANs may traverse API boundary
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Implement PCI-certified tokenization at API ingress (Stripe, Braintree, or Vault)

vulnerabilities.description: HTTPS redirect middleware absent — HTTP connections not forced to TLS
No dedicated /payment/* routes with RBAC enforcement found

components.name: fastapi
components.pci_scope_note: Payment API framework — must be on latest stable version

components.name: python-jose
components.pci_scope_note: JWT verification for payment auth — pin to >=3.3.0 (CVE-2024 patched)

components.name: cryptography
components.pci_scope_note: AES-256 and Fernet encryption for CHD at rest — pin to >=42.0.8

components.name: pydantic
components.pci_scope_note: Payment payload validation — strict=True on all payment models

components.name: sqlalchemy
components.pci_scope_note: If used for payment DB — parameterized queries required; no raw SQL

components.name: stripe
components.pci_scope_note: Recommended PCI-certified tokenization provider — install and pin version

components.name: redis
components.pci_scope_note: Required for distributed rate limiting and idempotency key storage

components.name: presidio-analyzer
components.pci_scope_note: PAN/PHI detection in payloads — required when pii.enabled: true

components.name: presidio-anonymizer
components.pci_scope_note: PAN/PHI scrubbing before LLM calls — required when pii.enabled: true

components.name: slowapi
components.pci_scope_note: Rate limiting on payment endpoints — required; use Redis backend in production

pci_dss_attestation.attestation_status: INCOMPLETE — critical findings must be resolved
blocking_findings: ENC-001  — No CHD encryption at rest (T-PG-I-01)
PII disabled — PAN flows to external LLM (T-PG-I-04)
passing_controls: Req 12 (pass)   — Threat model and SBOM maintained
